title: Checkbox
description: Checkbox is a multi-select binary control for consent, filters, permissions, and grouped option lists. Use it when users can select zero, one, or many independent items rather than making a mutually exclusive choice.
intro: Checkbox builds on the shared field foundation, so it supports labels, helper and error text, validation hooks, disabled and readonly states, and Angular forms integration. It also adds checkbox-specific shape options and an indeterminate state for partially selected groups.

featureSections.title: Basic selection
featureSections.description: Use checkboxes when options are independent and users may select several of them at once. Each label should describe the chosen state clearly without needing extra interpretation.

featureSections.title: Label positions
featureSections.description: The shared field wrapper supports labels around the control or no visible label at all. When the visible label is hidden, provide `ariaLabel` so the checkbox still has an accessible name.

featureSections.title: Shapes and density
featureSections.description: Shape and size let the checkbox align with different surfaces, but the component should still feel quiet and utilitarian. Most product UIs should stay close to the default rounded appearance.

featureSections.title: States and indeterminate
featureSections.description: Disabled and readonly communicate different product states, while indeterminate is useful for grouped selection where some but not all children are active.

featureSections.title: Filter group pattern
featureSections.description: Checkboxes are often used in stacked filter panels or sidebars. Showing them as a grouped surface is more useful than isolated single controls.

featureSections.title: Permissions panel
featureSections.description: More advanced examples should combine related controls and realistic structure. This pattern uses parent and child checkboxes to model a partially selected permissions surface users can adapt directly.

accessibility.title: Accessible name
accessibility.body:
The inner checkbox uses `ariaLabel` when provided and otherwise falls back to the visible `label`. If the visible label is hidden or omitted, provide an explicit accessible name.

| Source | Accessible name |
| --- | --- |
| `ariaLabel` | explicit accessible name |
| visible `label` | default fallback |
| no label + no `ariaLabel` | avoid this state |

accessibility.title: Keyboard and state
accessibility.body:
The control is backed by a native checkbox input, so it keeps the expected browser interaction model.

| Key | Action |
| --- | --- |
| `Tab` | moves focus to or from the checkbox |
| `Space` | toggles checked state when interactive |

| State | Attribute |
| --- | --- |
| checked | native `checked` |
| indeterminate | native mixed checkbox state |
| disabled | native `disabled` |
| required | native `required` |

accessibility.title: Descriptions, errors, and indeterminate
accessibility.body:
Helper text and error text are wired into `aria-describedby` through the shared field wrapper. When an error is present, it becomes the active description and helper text is suppressed.

Use `indeterminate` only for partially selected parent groups. It should communicate mixed child state, not act as a third standalone choice.

apiSections.title: CheckboxComponent - ui-checkbox
apiSections.lead: Standalone checkbox control built on the shared FieldComponent. It integrates with Angular forms through ControlValueAccessor and renders a native checkbox input behind the visual treatment.

blocks.title: Inputs
rows: Visual checkbox shape: rounded, circular, or square.
Puts the checkbox into a partially selected visual state until the next user change resolves it.

blocks.title: Inherited field inputs
rows: Shared field surface token inherited from `FieldComponent`.
Controls where the field label is placed relative to the control.
Supporting helper text rendered below the field when there is no active error.
Validation or manual error message managed by the shared field base.
Disables the field and its interactive affordances.
Keeps the value visible while preventing user changes.
HTML form name used by the field wrapper and native control wiring.
Control id used to connect label, help text, and error messaging.
Inherited autocomplete hint for native form compatibility.
Inherited shared-field clear-button flag when supported by the concrete control.
Overrides the accessible name when no visible label is appropriate.
Appends extra descriptive ids to the computed `aria-describedby` value.
Enables inherited automatic validation error handling from `FieldComponent`.

blocks.title: Outputs
rows: Emitted when the checked value changes from user interaction.

paragraphs: The component implements ControlValueAccessor, so it works with ngModel, reactive forms, and Angular validators.
When `indeterminate` is true, the next user change resolves the control to the checked state and clears the indeterminate flag.
blocks.title: Notes
Related mechanisms
items: FieldComponent - shared base handling labels, helper and error text, aria wiring, and validation synchronization.
Native checkbox input - provides the underlying focus, form, and keyboard semantics.
